studies.headline: Lagos Case Study - Urban Planning and Management Platform
studies.title: Lagos Case Study - Urban Planning and Management Platform
studies.challenge: Support planning and management with a coherent view of the territory.
studies.solution: Urban planning and management platform integrated with operational data.
studies.outcome: Stronger alignment between planning, permits, and day-to-day management.
studies.imageAlt: Turquoise water between rocky sea cliffs in Lagos, Portugal.
studies.excerpt: Turquoise water between rocky sea cliffs in Lagos, Portugal.

studies.headline: B-Smart Famalicão Case Study - Smart City Management Solution
studies.title: B-Smart Famalicão Case Study - Smart City Management Solution
studies.challenge: Coordinate urban management and citizen-facing services across departments.
studies.solution: City-scale operational platform for territorial intelligence and workflows.
studies.outcome: More integrated city operations and a stronger base for digital services.
studies.imageAlt: Famalicão city logo displayed over a view of a town square with historic buildings, leafless trees, and flowers in the foreground.
studies.excerpt: Famalicão city logo displayed over a view of a town square with historic buildings, leafless trees, and flowers in the foreground.

studies.headline: GIRA Case Study - First Shared Bike Service in Lisbon
studies.title: GIRA Case Study - First Shared Bike Service in Lisbon
studies.challenge: Operate a shared bike fleet with reliable real-time visibility.
studies.solution: Data and operations integration for fleet status and city coordination.
studies.outcome: Improved service reliability and operational awareness for GIRA.
studies.imageAlt: EMEL logo overlaid on a city street scene featuring a parked bicycle and a pedestrian walking on a cobblestone sidewalk.
studies.excerpt: EMEL logo overlaid on a city street scene featuring a parked bicycle and a pedestrian walking on a cobblestone sidewalk.

studies.headline: Lisbon Case Study - Traffic Closures Solution
studies.title: Lisbon Case Study - Traffic Closures Solution
studies.challenge: Communicate and manage traffic closures with less confusion and rework.
studies.solution: Operational workflows and maps-based clarity for closures and detours.
studies.outcome: Clearer public and internal coordination around road and event closures.
studies.imageAlt: Lisbon City Hall logo overlaid on Praça do Comércio in Lisbon, with people walking across the square under a bright blue sky.
studies.excerpt: Lisbon City Hall logo overlaid on Praça do Comércio in Lisbon, with people walking across the square under a bright blue sky.

studies.headline: GeoEstrela Case Study - Smart City Management Solution
studies.title: GeoEstrela Case Study - Smart City Management Solution
studies.challenge: Manage incidents and requests with limited staff and many stakeholders.
studies.solution: Lightweight smart-city management workflows with map-centric views.
studies.outcome: Faster triage and clearer accountability for parish operations.
studies.imageAlt: Estrela parish logo overlaid on a Lisbon street scene with traditional tiled façades and colorful buildings.
studies.excerpt: Estrela parish logo overlaid on a Lisbon street scene with traditional tiled façades and colorful buildings.

studies.headline: Groupe Renault Case Study - Smart Factory Incident Management
studies.title: Groupe Renault Case Study - Smart Factory Incident Management
studies.challenge: Respond faster to incidents across a complex factory environment.
studies.solution: Operational tooling for incident visibility, coordination, and follow-up.
studies.outcome: Clearer incident handling and less friction between teams on the ground.
studies.imageAlt: Industrial factory interior with metal walkways, machinery, and warm overhead lighting.
studies.excerpt: Industrial factory interior with metal walkways, machinery, and warm overhead lighting.

studies.headline: Choice Car Case Study - Routing Optimization Solution
studies.title: Choice Car Case Study - Routing Optimization Solution
studies.challenge: Reduce cost and delay from suboptimal routing across the network.
studies.solution: Routing optimization using geospatial and operational constraints.
studies.outcome: More efficient routes and better use of vehicles and drivers.
studies.imageAlt: Choice Car logo overlaid on an aerial view of a highway interchange surrounded by green trees.
studies.excerpt: Choice Car logo overlaid on an aerial view of a highway interchange surrounded by green trees.

studies.headline: Infralobo Case Study - Smart Resort Management
studies.title: Infralobo Case Study - Smart Resort Management
studies.challenge: Run a large resort territory with consistent operations and services.
studies.solution: Integrated resort management and spatial awareness for teams.
studies.outcome: Better coordination across facilities, public space, and maintenance.
studies.imageAlt: Scenic coastal golf course, with a golfer mid-swing overlooking the ocean.
studies.excerpt: Scenic coastal golf course, with a golfer mid-swing overlooking the ocean.

studies.headline: Delta Case Study - Salesforce Optimization in Traditional Retail
studies.title: Delta Case Study - Salesforce Optimization in Traditional Retail
studies.challenge: Align field operations and distribution with commercial systems.
studies.solution: Process and tooling optimization connected to Salesforce and operations.
studies.outcome: Smoother retail operations and fewer bottlenecks in the field network.
studies.imageAlt: Close-up of an espresso being poured into a cup from a coffee machine.
studies.excerpt: Close-up of an espresso being poured into a cup from a coffee machine.

studies.headline: Chronopost Case Study - Pickup Network Optimization
studies.title: Chronopost Case Study - Pickup Network Optimization
studies.challenge: Improve pickup point coverage and efficiency across the network.
studies.solution: Network optimization with geospatial and capacity constraints.
studies.outcome: Better pickup performance and more efficient use of points.
studies.imageAlt: Chronopost logo centered over a warehouse interior with tall storage racks filled with boxes and pallets labeled by rack numbers.
studies.excerpt: Chronopost logo centered over a warehouse interior with tall storage racks filled with boxes and pallets labeled by rack numbers.

studies.headline: Lisbon Case Study - Floods Data Catalogue
studies.title: Lisbon Case Study - Floods Data Catalogue
studies.challenge: Make flood-related data discoverable and usable across teams and systems.
studies.solution: Structured data catalogue and geospatial-oriented access for operational use.
studies.outcome: Better visibility into flood datasets to support planning and response.
studies.imageAlt: Aerial view of Lisbon’s Praça do Comércio and the Tagus River with the Lisboa Câmara Municipal logo centered over the image.
studies.excerpt: Aerial view of Lisbon’s Praça do Comércio and the Tagus River with the Lisboa Câmara Municipal logo centered over the image.
